title: Charles Mwelwa v Stephen Chikota and Anor (2022/CCZ/ A006) [2023] ZMCC 22 (27 October 2023)
case_name: Charles Mwelwa v Stephen Chikota and Anor
issue_tags: misconduct by candidate or with agent's consent and requirement that misconduct be widespread enough to have prevented majority voters choosing preferred candidate
outcome_detail: Appeal dismissed: isolated incidents of violence and intimidation were not proven to have prevented the majority from choosing their preferred candidate
